title: myroxylon frutescens
intro: Myroxylon frutescens, also known as Palo Santo, is a tropical tree native to the Americas, particularly in the tropical forests of Central and South America. The tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Myroxylon frutescens include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Myroxylon frutescens include essential oils, extracts, and tea, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
